name: Microsoft Teams Issue
description: Can\'t log in to Microsoft Teams even though my credentials are correct

name: Laptop Windows Issue
description: I assisted Sir Alwen Rodrigues of AGX Cebu with his laptop; the problem is that it does not continue on Windows.
resolution: I pressed the one touch button on his laptop to enter the bios setup, I restored the bios setup to default and I disabled the boot priority of his HDD so that the SSD would be the boot priority and the laptop worked and the issue went away.

name: Printout Issue (Black)
description: I tried to print documents, but nothing came out of the black ink, I checked the black ink tank and found that the black ink tank was at a critical level.
resolution: I refilled the ink tank with black but still no ink came out of the black, so I did a power cleaning and flushing to get rid of the air inside the ink system.

name: The wrong app opens when opening Microsoft Office.
description: The wrong app opens when opening Microsoft Office.
resolution: I Change the default file association and removed apps that were not needed on his laptop.
